channel.title: Python on Aaron's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Aaron's Blog

item.title: Igris Growth Engine
item.description: Automated self-improvement loop. Every 2h cron, domain rotation, Gemini-powered search+build pipeline. 7am daily Slack digest of new ideas and proposals.

item.title: CTI Dashboard
item.description: Live threat intelligence terminal dashboard. Python. SOC-focused. Planned as a recurring revenue add-on to night audit security workflow.

item.title: Igris OS Dashboard
item.description: Python/Textual terminal dashboard — primary ops center. Panels: Overview, Agents, Memory, Network, Activity, Skills, Chat, Bus, Advisor. Advisor panel has drift tracking and LLM-powered synthesis.

item.title: Igris AI — 5-Phase Security Hardening Complete
item.description: Completed all 5 phases of security hardening on Igris AI assistant: foundation security modules, secrets migration to Windows Credential Manager (Argon2id), elimination of shell=True (41 instances), input validation at all entry points (5 layers), GUI and plugin patching.

item.title: Igris AI Assistant
item.description: Personal AI assistant — 22,000+ lines, 132 modules. 5-phase security hardening complete (secrets management, input validation, shell=True elimination, GUI/plugin hardening). Windows-primary. Memory backed by OneDrive JSON.
